items.name: Hybrid-Deepfake-Tweet-Detection-using-Stylometry-and-Explainable-AI
items.description: This project presents a hybrid deep learning framework for detecting AI-generated (deepfake) tweets using stylometric feature analysis and machine learning models, combined with Explainable AI techniques to ensure transparency and interpretability.  This system classifies tweets as:  ✅ Human-written  🤖 AI-generated

items.name: Hyperspectral-Medical-AI
items.description: Unified Spectral-Spatial Machine Learning Framework for Hyperspectral Medical Image Analysis and Tumor Detection

items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: ModelLens
items.description: Adaptive Data-Driven Framework for Auto-Scaling ModelLens, leveraging Real-Time Data and Distributed Data Preprocessing Pipelines as a Scalable Machine-Learning-Platform.

items.name: Deforestation-and-Vegetation-Loss-Monitoring-in-Southern-Nigeria-Using-Remote-Sensing-and-ML
items.description: AI-driven framework for monitoring deforestation and vegetation loss in Southern Nigeria using synthetic remote sensing data and machine learning. Designed for reproducibility, policy simulation, and capacity building in data-scarce regions, with scalable pathways to real satellite-based forest monitoring systems.

items.name: CodePulse
items.description: Cloud-agnostic, containerized CodePulse orchestrates scalable, intelligent, distributed workloads with and AI-driven insights within a robust Machine Learning Framework.

items.name: AgentLens
items.description: Context-Adaptive AgentLens Platform Utilizing Dynamic Spatial Awareness and Machine Learning Driven Optimization Framework.

items.name: gut-microbiome-multi-cohort-ml
items.description: This project implements a cross-cohort machine learning framework for disease prediction using gut microbiome and metabolomics data across 14 independent cohorts.

items.name: KeyForge
items.description: High-Performance, Machine-Learning-Driven KeyForge Architecture Leverages Scalable, Intelligent, Distributed Systems for Real-Time Data Processing and Analytics Framework.

items.name: LexTransition-AI
items.description: LexTransition AI is an open-source, offline-first legal assistant. It helps users navigate the transition from old Indian laws (IPC/CrPC/IEA) to the new **BNS/BNSS/BSA** frameworks. Using local Machine Learning and OCR, it analyzes legal documents and maps law sections with 100% grounded accuracy.

items.name: global-drought-prediction-with-credit
items.description: Code to process data to train a machine learning DroughtFormer, built in the CREDIT framework, to predict drought related variables (ML model is trained globally, but there is a regional focus on Africa). Also contains code to analyze DroughtFormer predictions.

items.name: Hybrid-Fake-Job-Detection
items.description: A research-driven Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for detecting fraudulent job postings using multi-source fraud signal fusion and explainable classification.

items.description: The PennyLane-Qrack plugin integrates the Qrack quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.

items.name: PyCaretAgent
items.description: PyCaretAgent is an autonomous AI agent framework that extends PyCaret with advanced reasoning and tool-use capabilities using the Google Generative AI SDK (google-adk). It bridges the gap between natural language requirements and production-ready machine learning pipelines.

items.name: autonomous-trading-ecosystem-framework--atef-
items.description: Develop an AI framework that autonomously evolves trading strategies, models, and market predictions using self-reinforcing machine learning algorithms and real-time data integration.

Organiza o fluxo de dados em etapas orientadas a domínio, promovendo rastreabilidade, reprodutibilidade e integração consistente entre análise de dados, modelagem estatística e aplicações de machine learning.

It includes end-to-end pipelines, feature engineering experiments, and predictive modeling using various machine learning frameworks.

items.name: Stock-Price-Prediction-ARIMA-vs.-XGBoost-Multi-Horizon-Framework

items.description: Qurating is a system that helps evaluate and score datasets based on their quality. It is inspired by the QuRating framework and focuses on selecting better data for machine learning tasks.

items.description: A Python framework for volatility forecasting using Quantum Reservoir Computing (Qiskit) and GARCH (Arch). Benchmarks quantum machine learning against econometric baselines on S&P 500 data.

items.name: -Behavioral-Clustering-Framework-
items.description: An analytical implementation of Unsupervised Machine Learning to identify customer personas. This framework utilizes K-Means clustering and feature scaling to segment users based on behavioral data, optimized through WCSS and Elbow Method heuristics.

items.name: AutoML-Cash-Flow-Optimization-for-Insurance-Companies
items.description: AutoML Cash Flow Optimization for Insurance Companies is a machine learning framework that enhances financial forecasting and liquidity planning. It automates preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection, and hyperparameter tuning to deliver accurate cash flow predictions for data-driven decision-making.

items.description: Data-Driven Framework Using Advanced Analytics & Machine Learning for Gaming Trend Analysis and Player Performance Prediction

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

The approach is compared with TPOT and auto-sklearn.

By integrating GIS processing, digital elevation models, rainfall data, and feature engineering techniques, the project aims to develop a cost-effective and scalable predictive framework.

items.name: MAIES

It interprets user intent, profiles datasets, detects risks and patterns, and recommends optimal machine learning strategies — all through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

It supports workforce demand forecasting, intelligent staff scheduling, and performance evaluation using machine learning, optimization, and NLP for research, experimentation, and reproducible healthcare workforce analytics.

items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
